message:
feat(core,layout,parser): add FxHash collections, packet-beta field parsing, and Sankey flow-weighted sizing

Core: introduce NodeMap, NodeSet, and EdgeMap type aliases backed by
rustc-hash FxHash for ~7-10x faster hashing on sequential internal IDs.
Re-export FxHashMap/FxHashSet and add unit tests for new collection types.

Parser: implement structured packet-beta field parsing with bit-range
syntax (e.g. `0-7: "Source Port"`), automatic width-hint classes
(packet-bits-N, packet-field-wide), and sequential edge chaining between
fields. Includes three new parser tests.

Layout: replace integer degree counting in Sankey with actual flow values
parsed from edge labels, producing proportionally sized nodes. Extensive
rustfmt cleanup across layout module (line-length reformatting, method
chain splits, test formatting).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
